title: Create: Compat Core
description: The Core Mod with new Items and Recipes used for all Create: Compat Mods
body:
This mod serves as the core library for all Create: Compat mods.
Its main purpose is to provide a shared foundation of items, blocks, and recipes for the Create mod, making it easier for developers to build new compatibility addons without reinventing the "wheel".

By centralizing common features and assets, Create: Compat Core ensures consistency, reduces redundancy, and allows addon creators to focus on adding new integrations rather than repeating the same setup steps. This also helps keep your modpack lightweight and well-structured.

Whether you're a developer looking for a stable base or a player who enjoys extended compatibility between Create and other mods, this library is required to make everything work smoothly.

If you have suggestions, ideas, or feedback to improve the mod, feel free to share them in the comments
